code:
import io

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line))
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  mut i = 1
  while i <= n
    if i % 15 == 0
      println("FizzBuzz")
    else if i % 3 == 0
      println("Fizz")
    else if i % 5 == 0
      println("Buzz")
    else
      println("#{i}")
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  Ok(())
end

import string
